message.content:
@startuml
title Policy Authorization flow between Smart Edge Open and 5G core

participant "User/Admin" as User
participant "CLI" as CLI
participant "Af Microservice" as AfMicroservice
participant "NEF" as NEF
participant "NGC CP Function" as NGC

section "Smart Edge Open Controller Components"
    participant "Af Microservice" as AfMicroservice
    participant "CLI" as CLI
    participant "NEF" as NEF
    participant "NGC CP Function" as NGC
    participant "Policy Authorization - Application Session Context GET flow" as PolicyFlow
end section

section "5G Core Components"
    participant "Af Microservice" as AfMicroservice
    participant "NEF" as NEF
    participant "NGC CP Function" as NGC
    participant "Policy Authorization - Application Session Context GET flow" as PolicyFlow
end section

actor User
participant CLI
participant AfMicroservice
participant NEF
participant NGC

subgraph "Smart Edge Open Controller Components"
    participant AfMicroservice
    participant CLI
    participant NEF
    participant NGC
    participant PolicyFlow
end subgraph

subgraph "5G Core Components"
    participant AfMicroservice
    participant NEF
    participant NGC
    participant PolicyFlow
end subgraph

User -> CLI : Get app session context with appSessionId
CLI -> AfMicroservice : /af/v1/policy-authorization/app-sessions/{appSessionId} GET
AfMicroservice -> NGC : /npcf-policyauthorization/v1/app-sessions/{appSessionId} GET
NGC -> AfMicroservice : 200 OK: app-session information \ ERROR
AfMicroservice -> CLI : 200 OK: app-session information \ ERROR
CLI -> User : Success: app-session information

@enduml
